title: sempervivum tectorum subsp. boutignyanum
intro: Sempervivum tectorum subsp. boutignyanum, also known as Jovibarba heuffelii, is a succulent plant species commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jovibarba heuffelii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Jovibarba heuffelii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its effectiveness may vary and more research is needed to confirm its benefits.
